docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF GAINES, STACIE YVETTE AS TO DEFENDANT MODERN INDUSTRIAL SERVICES, A FLORIDA CORPORATION MODERN INDUSTRIAL SERVICES OF FORT MYERS INC., A FLORIDA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
